evidence.text: Charity Majors April 01, 2022 One of the most important things an organization can focus on is how to reduce their feedback loops. A great team will optimize the amount of time it takes to get a single line of code out to the world, setting themselves up for success at any scale. We’ll take a look at the sociotechnical practices that help us build teams that nurture great engineers.
